div.head: 41. Editorial Note
div.p: At its 230th meeting on January 5, 1955, the National Security Council discussed controls on trade with the People’s Republic of China as spelled out in NSC 5429/5. For text of the memorandum of discussion at this meeting, see volume II, page 2. NSC 5429/5 is printed in Foreign Relations, 1952–1954, volume XII, Part 1, page 1062.
